label: Bill store mode
description: Defines a bill store mode that controls where crafted products are delivered after a production bill completes.

listOrder.label: List order
listOrder.description: Controls the position of this store mode in the bill configuration dropdown. Shipped modes use multiples of 10 (0, 10, 20) to leave room for modded entries.

new-bill-store-mode.label: New bill store mode
new-bill-store-mode.description: Minimal bill store mode with a def name, label, and list order.
